title: Critics call US–Indonesia trade deal ‘extractive colonialism’ over mining, fossil fuels
description: Activists warn a new US-Indonesia trade deal could accelerate mining, deforestation and fossil fuel use, with weak, nonbinding environmental safeguards.

title: Salkhan Fossil Park set for major upgrade as security tightened, tourism push intensifies
description: Sonbhadra district magistrate Badri Nath Singh said the forest department has been directed to enhance protection measures at the park.

title: An ancient oracle warned invading Persia would backfire – from Croesus to Trump, rulers have failed to listen
description: Invasions of ancient Persia were always daunting tasks. They often led to disaster.

title: Ateneo taps AI, robotics to uncover ancient PH history
description: An archaeology project at Ateneo de Manila University is using robotics and machine learning to improve how excavations are conducted, shedding new light on early human activity in the Philippine archipelago. The post Ateneo taps AI, robotics to uncover ancient PH history appeared first on Newsbytes.PH .

title: Ateneo robot explorers uncover Philippine islands’ ancient technologies
description: Danika Geronimo, Ateneo de Manila University Research Communications Long before the first Spanish ships arrived on our shores, the Philippine islands were already home to daring seafarers with technology that enabled them to cross vast stretches of open seas, hunt formidable marine life, and build lives in a world that was anything but forgiving. Centuries [...]
